query:
INSERT INTO `receipt_index` (`monthLabel`, `year`, `month`, `winner`, `basketTotals`, `categoryBreakdown`, `receiptCount`, `summary`) VALUES
(
  'January 2026', 2026, 1, 'Aldi',
  '{"Tesco": 71.20, "Asda": 67.80, "Sainsburys": 73.50, "Morrisons": 69.40, "Aldi": 54.30, "Lidl": 56.10}',
  '[{"category":"Dairy & Eggs","Tesco":12.40,"Asda":11.80,"Sainsburys":13.20,"Morrisons":12.10,"Aldi":9.20,"Lidl":9.60},{"category":"Meat & Fish","Tesco":18.60,"Asda":17.40,"Sainsburys":19.80,"Morrisons":18.20,"Aldi":13.80,"Lidl":14.50},{"category":"Fruit & Veg","Tesco":9.80,"Asda":9.20,"Sainsburys":10.40,"Morrisons":9.60,"Aldi":7.40,"Lidl":7.80},{"category":"Bread & Bakery","Tesco":6.20,"Asda":5.80,"Sainsburys":6.60,"Morrisons":6.00,"Aldi":4.60,"Lidl":4.80},{"category":"Cupboard Staples","Tesco":14.40,"Asda":13.80,"Sainsburys":14.80,"Morrisons":13.90,"Aldi":11.20,"Lidl":11.60},{"category":"Drinks","Tesco":9.80,"Asda":9.80,"Sainsburys":8.70,"Morrisons":9.60,"Aldi":8.10,"Lidl":7.80}]',
  312,
  'Aldi claimed the top spot in January 2026, coming in ÂŁ16.90 cheaper than the average big-four basket. Post-Christmas budgets drove a surge in receipt scans, with families finding they could save over ÂŁ800 a year by switching from Tesco to Aldi for their weekly shop. Meat and dairy showed the biggest price gaps across supermarkets this month.'
),
(
  'February 2026', 2026, 2, 'Aldi',
  '{"Tesco": 69.80, "Asda": 66.20, "Sainsburys": 72.10, "Morrisons": 68.50, "Aldi": 53.60, "Lidl": 55.40}',
  '[{"category":"Dairy & Eggs","Tesco":11.80,"Asda":11.20,"Sainsburys":12.60,"Morrisons":11.60,"Aldi":8.90,"Lidl":9.20},{"category":"Meat & Fish","Tesco":17.80,"Asda":16.80,"Sainsburys":19.20,"Morrisons":17.60,"Aldi":13.40,"Lidl":14.00},{"category":"Fruit & Veg","Tesco":9.60,"Asda":9.00,"Sainsburys":10.20,"Morrisons":9.40,"Aldi":7.20,"Lidl":7.60},{"category":"Bread & Bakery","Tesco":6.00,"Asda":5.60,"Sainsburys":6.40,"Morrisons":5.80,"Aldi":4.40,"Lidl":4.60},{"category":"Cupboard Staples","Tesco":14.20,"Asda":13.60,"Sainsburys":14.60,"Morrisons":13.70,"Aldi":11.00,"Lidl":11.40},{"category":"Drinks","Tesco":10.40,"Asda":10.00,"Sainsburys":9.10,"Morrisons":10.40,"Aldi":8.70,"Lidl":8.60}]',
  389,
  'Aldi retained its position as the UK''s cheapest supermarket in February 2026, with the average scanned basket coming in at ÂŁ53.60 â€” ÂŁ16.20 less than Tesco. Lidl remained close behind in second place. Cupboard staples and drinks showed the most significant price differences between discount and traditional supermarkets this month, with Aldi undercutting Sainsbury''s by up to 25% on branded equivalents.'
),
(
  'March 2026', 2026, 3, 'Aldi',
  '{"Tesco": 70.40, "Asda": 65.90, "Sainsburys": 72.80, "Morrisons": 68.20, "Aldi": 53.10, "Lidl": 55.20}',
  '[{"category":"Dairy & Eggs","Tesco":12.10,"Asda":11.40,"Sainsburys":12.90,"Morrisons":11.80,"Aldi":8.80,"Lidl":9.10},{"category":"Meat & Fish","Tesco":18.20,"Asda":16.60,"Sainsburys":19.50,"Morrisons":17.80,"Aldi":13.20,"Lidl":13.80},{"category":"Fruit & Veg","Tesco":9.40,"Asda":8.80,"Sainsburys":10.00,"Morrisons":9.20,"Aldi":7.10,"Lidl":7.50},{"category":"Bread & Bakery","Tesco":5.80,"Asda":5.60,"Sainsburys":6.20,"Morrisons":5.70,"Aldi":4.30,"Lidl":4.50},{"category":"Cupboard Staples","Tesco":14.60,"Asda":13.40,"Sainsburys":15.00,"Morrisons":13.90,"Aldi":11.40,"Lidl":11.80},{"category":"Drinks","Tesco":10.30,"Asda":10.10,"Sainsburys":9.20,"Morrisons":9.80,"Aldi":8.30,"Lidl":8.50}]',
  451,
  'March 2026 sees Aldi extend its lead as the UK''s cheapest supermarket for a full basket shop, with the average TrolleyRoast-scanned receipt coming in at ÂŁ53.10. That''s ÂŁ17.30 less than Sainsbury''s and ÂŁ17.70 less than Tesco. Spring price changes hit fruit and veg hardest, with Tesco and Sainsbury''s both increasing prices on seasonal produce while Aldi and Lidl held firm. Over 450 real receipts were used to compile this month''s index.'
);
